strengths: 21+ years progressive software engineering experience (2006-present) across web, mobile, embedded systems and infrastructure
Demonstrated entrepreneurship with GISCollective, showing platform vision and community adoption
Recent AI infrastructure involvement at re:cinq with MCP and AI-agent frameworks, indicating current engagement with AI technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML specialization: career is general software engineering with recent infrastructure-focused AI work, lacking AI products, platform design, or ML expertise required for AI strategy role

Missing Director-level strategic leadership: resume shows Staff/Senior IC progression focused on implementation, with no evidence of identifying future platform states or advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption
No formal AI education: holds BS in Computer Science only; role preferably requires Master's or PhD in AI-related field to guide AI platform strategy
response.justification: Bogdan meets baseline requirements (21 years experience, BS in Computer Science) and shows recent AI infrastructure engagement. However, the role explicitly requires specialized AI platform strategy expertise. His background is broad full-stack engineering without demonstrated AI products, strategic platform vision, or customer advisory—core Principal Engineer responsibilities. Current MCP infrastructure work signals direction but is insufficient for a specialized AI strategy role requiring vision-setting on future cloud/AI platforms. Strong candidate for Staff Engineer on AI infrastructure team, but gap between implementation-focused IC and strategy-focused Principal Engineer is too significant for this specialized position.
